mapper.sql: A.NTACS_FCLT_MST_SEQ, A.NLVL_BAS_SEQ, A.STACS_SERVER_ID, A.SFCLT_PROMPT_NM , A.SFCLT_MODEL_NM, A.SFCLT_TYPE, A.PIP_FCLT_INET, A.NPORT_FCLT, A.SUSE_YN , A.DCREATE_DT, A.SCREATE_ID, A.DMODIFY_DT, A.SMODIFY_ID

A.SSVC_LINE_TYPE_CD, A.SSVC_GROUP_CD, A.SSVC_OBJ_CD, A.NLVL_BAS_SEQ , B.SSVC_LINE_TYPE_NM SSVC_LINE_TYPE_NM, C.SLVL_NM SSVC_GROUP_NM, D.SLVL_NM SSVC_OBJ_NM , E.NTACS_FCLT_MST_SEQ, E.STACS_SERVER_ID, E.SFCLT_PROMPT_NM , E.SFCLT_MODEL_NM, E.SFCLT_TYPE, E.PIP_FCLT_INET, E.NPORT_FCLT, E.SUSE_YN , E.DCREATE_DT, E.SCREATE_ID, E.DMODIFY_DT, E.SMODIFY_ID

A.SSVC_LINE_TYPE_CD, A.SSVC_GROUP_CD, A.SSVC_OBJ_CD, A.NLVL_BAS_SEQ , A.SSVC_LINE_TYPE_NM, A.SSVC_GROUP_NM, A.SSVC_OBJ_NM , A.NTACS_FCLT_MST_SEQ, A.STACS_SERVER_ID, A.SFCLT_PROMPT_NM , A.SFCLT_MODEL_NM, A.SFCLT_TYPE, A.PIP_FCLT_INET, A.NPORT_FCLT, A.SUSE_YN , A.DCREATE_DT, A.SCREATE_ID, A.DMODIFY_DT, A.SMODIFY_ID
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM MST.TB_TACS_FCLT_MST A
ORDER BY A.NTACS_FCLT_MST_SEQ
SELECT count(1) totalCount FROM MST.TB_TACS_FCLT_MST A
